name: Chicken & Potato Skillet Dinner
recipeIngredient: 4 cups frozen Ore-Ida Potatoes O'Brien, thawed
1 green or red bell pepper, coarsely chopped
2 cups chopped cooked chicken or turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add potatoes, onions, and bell pepper; cook about 8 minutes or until vegetables are tender, stirring frequently.
3. Sprinkle with flour; cook and stir 1 minute.
4. Add chicken, milk, bouillon, and pepper; simmer uncovered about 10 minutes or until mixture is thickened, stirring frequently.
5. Sprinkle with cheese; let stand 3 to 4 minutes or until cheese is melted.
